rules.name: Allow-DNS
rules.description: Allow DNS from spokes and onprem to Azure DNS

rules.name: Allow-NTP
rules.description: Allow NTP outbound from all internal networks

rules.name: Allow-Spoke-to-Spoke
rules.description: Allow traffic between Spoke01 and Spoke02 via firewall

rules.name: Allow-OnPrem-RDP
rules.description: Allow RDP from onprem to spoke VMs

rules.name: Allow-OnPrem-SSH
rules.description: Allow SSH from onprem to spoke VMs

rules.name: Allow-Spoke-to-OnPrem
rules.description: Allow traffic from spokes to onprem network

rules.name: Allow-MicrosoftServices
rules.description: Allow Microsoft update and telemetry FQDNs

rules.name: Allow-AzurePortal
rules.description: Allow Azure portal and management plane access
